calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Steele for (administrator) Daisy Brice. Anthony Jackson (beneficiary) also present.

The Court asked counsel that in regard to the notes, was she aware of the sale. Ms. Steele asked if the declaration of her client was received as it explained all of the issues. The Court asked if counsel had anything else to add. Ms. Steele stated that Mr. Jackson as sole beneficiary is present and can verify that everything was on the up and up, that they had a fair market appraisal, that the property was sold at that value, that it sold a few months ago and that they had a reappraisal for sale. The Court asked for the sale date. Ms. Steele stated that she did not know the exact date but that they had current fair market value as of that date. The Court took the Accounting Petition under submission indicating that it may carve out preliminary distribution.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)
